scripts.lint: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:static-analysis
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:static-analysis && npm run check:analysis-budget && npm run check:oversized-baseline-budget && npm run check:runtime-detection-budget && npm run check:instance-field-budget && npm run check:css-size-budget && npm run check:css-base-staging && npm run check:css-staged-sections && npm run check:css-post-cutover && npm run check:js-size-budget && npm run check:api-domain-size-budget && npm run check:api-account-share-staging && npm run check:bootstrap-rank-feedback-staging && npm run check:physics-collision-phase-staging && npm run check:physics-progress-step-staging && npm run check:physics-center-offset-staging && npm run check:ui-buttons && npm run check:unused-code && npm run check:no-window-assign && npm run check:asset-paths && npm run check:no-duplicate-web-layout-css && npm run check:no-legacy-canvas-runtime && npm run check:no-static-runtime-script && npm run test:e2e-smoke && npm run test:request
scripts.check:security: bash -lc "unset NPM_CONFIG_HTTP_PROXY npm_config_http_proxy NPM_CONFIG_HTTPS_PROXY npm_config_https_proxy HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy; npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate"
